revision.text:
'''乙酉'''（きのととり、いつゆう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて22番目で、前は[[甲申]]、次は[[丙戌]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は木、[[十二支]]の五行は金で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==乙酉の年==
==乙酉の日== ===[[選日]]=== 乙酉の日は[[十方暮]]の2日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''乙酉'''（きのととり、おつぼくのとり、いつゆう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの22番目で、前は[[甲申]]、次は[[丙戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==乙酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って25が余る年が乙酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[25年]] *[[85年]] *[[145年]] *[[205年]] *[[265年]] *[[325年]] *[[385年]] *[[445年]] *[[505年]] *[[565年]] *[[625年]] *[[685年]] *[[745年]] *[[805年]] *[[865年]] *[[925年]] *[[985年]] | *[[1045年]] *[[1105年]] *[[1165年]] *[[1225年]] *[[1285年]] *[[1345年]] *[[1405年]] *[[1465年]] *[[1525年]] *[[1585年]] *[[1645年]] *[[1705年]] *[[1765年]] *[[1825年]] *[[1885年]] *[[1945年]] | *[[2005年]] *[[2065年]] *[[2125年]] *[[2185年]] *[[2245年]] *[[2305年]] *[[2365年]] *[[2425年]] *[[2485年]] *[[2545年]] *[[2605年]] *[[2665年]] *[[2725年]] *[[2785年]] *[[2845年]] *[[2905年]] *[[2965年]] |}
==乙酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[8月]]が乙酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙酉の日== 乙酉の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 乙酉の日は[[十方暮]]の2日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:乙酉]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:乙酉]]

==乙酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って25が余る年が乙酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[25年]] *[[85年]] *[[145年]] *[[205年]] *[[265年]] *[[325年]] *[[385年]] *[[445年]] *[[505年]] *[[565年]] *[[625年]] *[[685年]] *[[745年]] *[[805年]] *[[865年]] *[[925年]] *[[985年]] | *[[1045年]] *[[1105年]] *[[1165年]] *[[1225年]] *[[1285年]] *[[1345年]] *[[1405年]] *[[1465年]] *[[1525年]] *[[1585年]] *[[1645年]] *[[1705年]] *[[1765年]] *[[1825年]] *[[1885年]] *[[1945年]] | *[[2005年]] *[[2065年]] *[[2125年]] *[[2185年]] *[[2245年]] *[[2305年]] *[[2365年]] *[[2425年]] *[[2485年]] *[[2545年]] *[[2605年]] *[[2665年]] *[[2725年]] *[[2785年]] *[[2845年]] *[[2905年]] *[[2965年]] |}
==乙酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[8月]]が乙酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙酉の日== 乙酉の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 乙酉の日は[[十方暮]]の2日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rooster-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙酉]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rooster-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:乙酉]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]]

==乙酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って25が余る年が乙酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[25年]] *[[85年]] *[[145年]] *[[205年]] *[[265年]] *[[325年]] *[[385年]] *[[445年]] *[[505年]] *[[565年]] *[[625年]] *[[685年]] *[[745年]] *[[805年]] *[[865年]] *[[925年]] *[[985年]] | *[[1045年]] *[[1105年]] *[[1165年]] *[[1225年]] *[[1285年]] *[[1345年]] *[[1405年]] *[[1465年]] *[[1525年]] *[[1585年]] *[[1645年]] *[[1705年]] *[[1765年]] *[[1825年]] *[[1885年]] *[[1945年]] | *[[2005年]] *[[2065年]] *[[2125年]] *[[2185年]] *[[2245年]] *[[2305年]] *[[2365年]] *[[2425年]] *[[2485年]] *[[2545年]] *[[2605年]] *[[2665年]] *[[2725年]] *[[2785年]] *[[2845年]] *[[2905年]] *[[2965年]] |}
==乙酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[8月]]が乙酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙酉の日== 乙酉の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 乙酉の日は[[十方暮]]の2日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rooster-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙酉]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:乙酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rooster-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:乙酉]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Wood Rooster]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''乙酉'''（きのととり、おつぼくのとり、いつゆう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの22番目で、前は[[甲申]]、次は[[丙戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。

==乙酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って25が余る年が乙酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[25年]] *[[85年]] *[[145年]] *[[205年]] *[[265年]] *[[325年]] *[[385年]] *[[445年]] *[[505年]] *[[565年]] *[[625年]] *[[685年]] *[[745年]] *[[805年]] *[[865年]] *[[925年]] *[[985年]] | *[[1045年]] *[[1105年]] *[[1165年]] *[[1225年]] *[[1285年]] *[[1345年]] *[[1405年]] *[[1465年]] *[[1525年]] *[[1585年]] *[[1645年]] *[[1705年]] *[[1765年]] *[[1825年]] *[[1885年]] *[[1945年]] | *[[2005年]] *[[2065年]] *[[2125年]] *[[2185年]] *[[2245年]] *[[2305年]] *[[2365年]] *[[2425年]] *[[2485年]] *[[2545年]] *[[2605年]] *[[2665年]] *[[2725年]] *[[2785年]] *[[2845年]] *[[2905年]] *[[2965年]] |}
==乙酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[8月]]が乙酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの22番目で、前は[[甲申]]、次は[[丙戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Qq---qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Rooster also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 乙酉'''（きのととり、おつぼくのとり、いつゆう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの22番目で、前は[[甲申]]、次は[[丙戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==乙酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って25が余る年が乙酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[25年]] *[[85年]] *[[145年]] *[[205年]] *[[265年]] *[[325年]] *[[385年]] *[[445年]] *[[505年]] *[[565年]] *[[625年]] *[[685年]] *[[745年]] *[[805年]] *[[865年]] *[[925年]] *[[985年]] | *[[1045年]] *[[1105年]] *[[1165年]] *[[1225年]] *[[1285年]] *[[1345年]] *[[1405年]] *[[1465年]] *[[1525年]] *[[1585年]] *[[1645年]] *[[1705年]] *[[1765年]] *[[1825年]] *[[1885年]] *[[1945年]] | *[[2005年]] *[[2065年]] *[[2125年]] *[[2185年]] *[[2245年]] *[[2305年]] *[[2365年]] *[[2425年]] *[[2485年]] *[[2545年]] *[[2605年]] *[[2665年]] *[[2725年]] *[[2785年]] *[[2845年]] *[[2905年]] *[[2965年]] |}
==乙酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[8月]]が乙酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙酉の日== 乙酉の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 乙酉の日は[[十方暮]]の2日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-Yin Wood Rooster-qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙酉]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙酉]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙酉]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Wood Rooster also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 乙酉'''（きのととり、おつぼくのとり、いつゆう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの22番目で、前は[[甲申]]、次は[[丙戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[乙]]は陰の[[木]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（金剋木）である。
==乙酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って25が余る年が乙酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[25年]] *[[85年]] *[[145年]] *[[205年]] *[[265年]] *[[325年]] *[[385年]] *[[445年]] *[[505年]] *[[565年]] *[[625年]] *[[685年]] *[[745年]] *[[805年]] *[[865年]] *[[925年]] *[[985年]] | *[[1045年]] *[[1105年]] *[[1165年]] *[[1225年]] *[[1285年]] *[[1345年]] *[[1405年]] *[[1465年]] *[[1525年]] *[[1585年]] *[[1645年]] *[[1705年]] *[[1765年]] *[[1825年]] *[[1885年]] *[[1945年]] | *[[2005年]] *[[2065年]] *[[2125年]] *[[2185年]] *[[2245年]] *[[2305年]] *[[2365年]] *[[2425年]] *[[2485年]] *[[2545年]] *[[2605年]] *[[2665年]] *[[2725年]] *[[2785年]] *[[2845年]] *[[2905年]] *[[2965年]] |}
==乙酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が0・5（十干が[[庚]]・[[乙]]）の年の[[8月]]が乙酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==乙酉の日== 乙酉の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 乙酉の日は[[十方暮]]の2日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:deprecated {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==乙酉の年== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙酉の年''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25年]] * [[85年]] * [[145年]] * [[205年]] * [[265年]] * [[325年]] * [[385年]] * [[445年]] * [[505年]] * [[565年]] * [[625年]] * [[685年]] * [[745年]] * [[805年]] * [[865年]] * [[925年]] * [[985年]] | * [[1045年]] * [[1105年]] * [[1165年]] * [[1225年]] * [[1285年]] * [[1345年]] * [[1405年]] * [[1465年]] * [[1525年]] * [[1585年]] * [[1645年]] * [[1705年]] * [[1765年]] * [[1825年]] * [[1885年]] * [[1945年]] | * [[2005年]] * [[2065年]] * [[2125年]] * [[2185年]] * [[2245年]] * [[2305年]] * [[2365年]] * [[2425年]] * [[2485年]] * [[2545年]] * [[2605年]] * [[2665年]] * [[2725年]] * [[2785年]] * [[2845年]] * [[2905年]] * [[2965年]] |}
==乙酉の月== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==乙酉の日== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ===選日=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Rooster-->[[category:qq close]] revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==乙酉の年== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙酉の年''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25年]] * [[85年]] * [[145年]] * [[205年]] * [[265年]] * [[325年]] * [[385年]] * [[445年]] * [[505年]] * [[565年]] * [[625年]] * [[685年]] * [[745年]] * [[805年]] * [[865年]] * [[925年]] * [[985年]] | * [[1045年]] * [[1105年]] * [[1165年]] * [[1225年]] * [[1285年]] * [[1345年]] * [[1405年]] * [[1465年]] * [[1525年]] * [[1585年]] * [[1645年]] * [[1705年]] * [[1765年]] * [[1825年]] * [[1885年]] * [[1945年]] | * [[2005年]] * [[2065年]] * [[2125年]] * [[2185年]] * [[2245年]] * [[2305年]] * [[2365年]] * [[2425年]] * [[2485年]] * [[2545年]] * [[2605年]] * [[2665年]] * [[2725年]] * [[2785年]] * [[2845年]] * [[2905年]] * [[2965年]] |}
==乙酉の月== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==乙酉の日== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ===選日=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.

==乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25年]] * [[85年]] * [[145年]] * [[205年]] * [[265年]] * [[325年]] * [[385年]] * [[445年]] * [[505年]] * [[565年]] * [[625年]] * [[685年]] * [[745年]] * [[805年]] * [[865年]] * [[925年]] * [[985年]] | * [[1045年]] * [[1105年]] * [[1165年]] * [[1225年]] * [[1285年]] * [[1345年]] * [[1405年]] * [[1465年]] * [[1525年]] * [[1585年]] * [[1645年]] * [[1705年]] * [[1765年]] * [[1825年]] * [[1885年]] * [[1945年]] | * [[2005年]] * [[2065年]] * [[2125年]] * [[2185年]] * [[2245年]] * [[2305年]] * [[2365年]] * [[2425年]] * [[2485年]] * [[2545年]] * [[2605年]] * [[2665年]] * [[2725年]] * [[2785年]] * [[2845年]] * [[2905年]] * [[2965年]] |}
==乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ===選日=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25年]] * [[85年]] * [[145年]] * [[205年]] * [[265年]] * [[325年]] * [[385年]] * [[445年]] * [[505年]] * [[565年]] * [[625年]] * [[685年]] * [[745年]] * [[805年]] * [[865年]] * [[925年]] * [[985年]] | * [[1045年]] * [[1105年]] * [[1165年]] * [[1225年]] * [[1285年]] * [[1345年]] * [[1405年]] * [[1465年]] * [[1525年]] * [[1585年]] * [[1645年]] * [[1705年]] * [[1765年]] * [[1825年]] * [[1885年]] * [[1945年]] | * [[2005年]] * [[2065年]] * [[2125年]] * [[2185年]] * [[2245年]] * [[2305年]] * [[2365年]] * [[2425年]] * [[2485年]] * [[2545年]] * [[2605年]] * [[2665年]] * [[2725年]] * [[2785年]] * [[2845年]] * [[2905年]] * [[2965年]] |}
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.

==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25]] * [[85]] * [[145]] * [[205]] * [[265]] * [[325]] * [[385]] * [[445]] * [[505]] * [[565]] * [[625]] * [[685]] * [[745]] * [[805]] * [[865]] * [[925]] * [[985]] | * [[1045]] * [[1105]] * [[1165]] * [[1225]] * [[1285]] * [[1345]] * [[1405]] * [[1465]] * [[1525]] * [[1585]] * [[1645]] * [[1705]] * [[1765]] * [[1825]] * [[1885]] * [[1945]] | * [[2005]] * [[2065]] * [[2125]] * [[2185]] * [[2245]] * [[2305]] * [[2365]] * [[2425]] * [[2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[2905]] * [[2965]] |}
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25]] * [[85]] * [[145]] * [[205]] * [[265]] * [[325]] * [[385]] * [[445]] * [[505]] * [[565]] * [[625]] * [[685]] * [[745]] * [[805]] * [[865]] * [[925]] * [[985]] | * [[1045]] * [[1105]] * [[1165]] * [[1225]] * [[1285]] * [[1345]] * [[1405]] * [[1465]] * [[1525]] * [[1585]] * [[1645]] * [[1705]] * [[1765]] * [[1825]] * [[1885]] * [[1945]] | * [[2005]] * [[2065]] * [[2125]] * [[2185]] * [[2245]] * [[2305]] * [[2365]] * [[2425]] * [[2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[2905]] * [[2965]] |}
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Trimming off this bad category]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25]] * [[85]] * [[145]] * [[205]] * [[265]] * [[325]] * [[385]] * [[445]] * [[505]] * [[565]] * [[625]] * [[685]] * [[745]] * [[805]] * [[865]] * [[925]] * [[985]] | * [[1045]] * [[1105]] * [[1165]] * [[1225]] * [[1285]] * [[1345]] * [[1405]] * [[1465]] * [[1525]] * [[1585]] * [[1645]] * [[1705]] * [[1765]] * [[1825]] * [[1885]] * [[1945]] | * [[2005]] * [[2065]] * [[2125]] * [[2185]] * [[2245]] * [[2305]] * [[2365]] * [[2425]] * [[2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[2905]] * [[2965]] |}
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Rooster-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙酉]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙酉]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙酉]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Rooster-->[[category:qq close]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙酉]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:]] [[sn:in Wood Rooster]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]] [[af:Houthaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]][[de:Holz-Hahneen]][[en:Wood Rooster]][[fr:Coq de boisboishak]][[it:Yit-chṳ́id]][[sn:ichouja]][[ko:을유]][[nds:Holt-Hahnvi]][[vi:Ất Dậu]][[za:Yitceij]][[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]][[zh-yue:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]]

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Old Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|甲}}" to "|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25]] * [[85]] * [[145]] * [[205]] * [[265]] * [[325]] * [[385]] * [[445]] * [[505]] * [[565]] * [[625]] * [[685]] * [[745]] * [[805]] * [[865]] * [[925]] * [[985]] | * [[1045]] * [[1105]] * [[1165]] * [[1225]] * [[1285]] * [[1345]] * [[1405]] * [[1465]] * [[1525]] * [[1585]] * [[1645]] * [[1705]] * [[1765]] * [[1825]] * [[1885]] * [[1945]] | * [[2005]] * [[2065]] * [[2125]] * [[2185]] * [[2245]] * [[2305]] * [[2365]] * [[2425]] * [[2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[2905]] * [[2965]] |}
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Rooster-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Rooster}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙酉]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:乙酉]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:乙酉]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:deprecated qq open]]<!--Yin Wood Rooster-->[[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Rooster}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙酉]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:]] [[sn:in Wood Rooster]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]] [[af:Houthaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]][[de:Holz-Hahneen]][[en:Wood Rooster]][[fr:Coq de boisboishak]][[it:Yit-chṳ́id]][[sn:ichouja]][[ko:을유]][[nds:Holt-Hahnvi]][[vi:Ất Dậu]][[za:Yitceij]][[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]][[zh-yue:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]]

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25]] * [[85]] * [[145]] * [[205]] * [[265]] * [[325]] * [[385]] * [[445]] * [[505]] * [[565]] * [[625]] * [[685]] * [[745]] * [[805]] * [[865]] * [[925]] * [[985]] | * [[1045]] * [[1105]] * [[1165]] * [[1225]] * [[1285]] * [[1345]] * [[1405]] * [[1465]] * [[1525]] * [[1585]] * [[1645]] * [[1705]] * [[1765]] * [[1825]] * [[1885]] * [[1945]] | * [[2005]] * [[2065]] * [[2125]] * [[2185]] * [[2245]] * [[2305]] * [[2365]] * [[2425]] * [[2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[2905]] * [[2965]] |}
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.

It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. ==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉|1=Rooster (zodiac)|lt=Rooster (酉)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25]] * [[85]] * [[145]] * [[205]] * [[265]] * [[325]] * [[385]] * [[445]] * [[505]] * [[565]] * [[625]] * [[685]] * [[745]] * [[805]] * [[865]] * [[925]] * [[985]] | * [[1045]] * [[1105]] * [[1165]] * [[1225]] * [[1285]] * [[1345]] * [[1405]] * [[1465]] * [[1525]] * [[1585]] * [[1645]] * [[1705]] * [[1765]] * [[1825]] * [[1885]] * [[1945]] | * [[2005]] * [[2065]] * [[2125]] * [[2185]] * [[2245]] * [[2305]] * [[2365]] * [[2425]] * [[2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[2905]] * [[2965]] |}
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉|1=Rooster (zodiac)|lt=Rooster (酉)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25]] * [[85]] * [[145]] * [[205]] * [[265]] * [[325]] * [[385]] * [[445]] * [[505]] * [[565]] * [[625]] * [[685]] * [[745]] * [[805]] * [[865]] * [[925]] * [[985]] | * [[1045]] * [[1105]] * [[1165]] * [[1225]] * [[1285]] * [[1345]] * [[1405]] * [[1465]] * [[1525]] * [[1585]] * [[1645]] * [[1705]] * [[1765]] * [[1825]] * [[1885]] * [[1945]] | * [[2005]] * [[2065]] * [[2125]] * [[2185]] * [[2245]] * [[2305]] * [[2365]] * [[2425]] * [[2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[2905]] * [[2965]] |}
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:c]][[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: 5]] [[Category:deprecated 11 open]]<!--Yin Wood Rooster-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Rooster}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙酉]][[Category:11]] [[Category:乙酉]][[Category:乙酉]][[Category:deprecated 11 open]]<!--Yin Wood Rooster-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Rooster}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙酉]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]] [[Category:]] [[sn:in Wood Rooster]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]] [[af:Houthaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]][[de:Holz-Hahneen]][[en:Wood Rooster]][[fr:Coq de boisboishak]][[it:Yit-chṳ́id]][[sn:ichouja]][[ko:을유]][[nds:Holt-Hahnvi]][[vi:Ất Dậu]][[za:Yitceij]][[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]][[zh-yue:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉|1=Rooster (zodiac)|lt=Rooster (酉)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25]] * [[85]] * [[145]] * [[205]] * [[265]] * [[325]] * [[385]] * [[445]] * [[505]] * [[565]] * [[625]] * [[685]] * [[745]] * [[805]] * [[865]] * [[925]] * [[985]] | * [[1045]] * [[1105]] * [[1165]] * [[1225]] * [[1285]] * [[1345]] * [[1405]] * [[1465]] * [[1525]] * [[1585]] * [[1645]] * [[1705]] * [[1765]] * [[1825]] * [[1885]] * [[1945]] | * [[2005]] * [[2065]] * [[2125]] * [[2185]] * [[2245]] * [[2305]] * [[2365]] * [[2425]] * [[2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[2905]] * [[2965]] |}
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: 5]] <!--Yin Wood Rooster-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Rooster}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:QQ]][[ja:乙酉]][[Category:11]] [[Category:乙酉]][[Category:乙酉]]<!--Yin Wood Rooster-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Rooster}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙酉]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[ja:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[en:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]] [[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]][[Category:11]]

In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉|1=Rooster (zodiac)|lt=Rooster (酉)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀}} |- | * [[25]] * [[85]] * [[145]] * [[205]] * [[265]] * [[325]] * [[385]] * [[445]] * [[505]] * [[565]] * [[625]] * [[685]] * [[745]] * [[805]] * [[865]] * [[925]] * [[985]] | * [[1045]] * [[1105]] * [[1165]] * [[1225]] * [[1285]] * [[1345]] * [[1405]] * [[1465]] * [[1525]] * [[1585]] * [[1645]] * [[1705]] * [[1765]] * [[1825]] * [[1885]] * [[1945]] | * [[2005]] * [[2065]] * [[2125]] * [[2185]] * [[2245]] * [[2305]] * [[2365]] * [[2425]] * [[2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[2905]] * [[2965]] |}
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮}}.

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=draft|12=draft}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=draft|12=draft}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|甲申|12=draft|12=draft}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|丙戌|12=draft|12=draft}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=draft|12=draft}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=draft|12=draft}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|木|12=draft|12=draft}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|ja|十二支|12=draft|12=draft}} symbol {{ill|Rooster|ja|酉|1=Rooster (zodiac)|lt=Rooster (酉)|12=draft|12=draft}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|金|12=draft|12=draft}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=draft|12=draft}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Years== A year in the {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|12=draft|12=draft}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|year|ja|年|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉|12=draft|12=draft}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! {{ill|1st Millennium|ja|1千年紀|12=draft|12=draft}} !! {{ill|2nd Millennium|ja|2千年紀|12=draft|12=draft}} !! {{ill|3rd Millennium|ja|3千年紀|12=draft|12=draft}} |- | * [[25]] * [[85]] * [[145]] * [[205]] * [[265]] * [[325]] * [[385]] * [[445]] * [[505]] * [[565]] * [[625]] * [[685]] * [[745]] * [[805]] * [[865]] * [[925]] * [[985]] | * [[1045]] * [[1105]] * [[1165]] * [[1225]] * [[1285]] * [[1345]] * [[1405]] * [[1465]] * [[1525]] * [[1585]] * [[1645]] * [[1705]] * [[1765]] * [[1825]] * [[1885]] * [[1945]] | * [[2005]] * [[2065]] * [[2125]] * [[2185]] * [[2245]] * [[2305]] * [[2365]] * [[2425]] * [[2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[2905]] * [[2965]] |}
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Months== In a {{ill|Western calendar|ja|西暦|12=draft|12=draft}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|ja|十干|12=draft|12=draft}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=draft|12=draft}}), the month of {{ill|August|ja|8月|12=draft|12=draft}} is designated as the {{ill|month (calendar)|ja|月 (暦)|12=draft|12=draft}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉|12=draft|12=draft}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露|12=draft|12=draft}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露|12=draft|12=draft}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉|12=draft|12=draft}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=draft|12=draft}}.
==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} <!--Yin Wood Rooster-->
<!--Yin Wood Rooster--> [[cdo:Ék-cṳ̄de]][[nds:Holt-Hahnvi]][[zh-min-nan:Īt-chú]][[zh-yue:乙酉]] {{draft categories| [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:乙酉]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Yin Wood Rooster]] [[ja:乙酉]] [[en:Yin Wood Rooster]] [[zh:乙酉]] [[ko:을유]] [[fr:Coq de bois]] [[de:Holz-Hahn]] [[sn:in Wood Rooster]] [[af:Houthaan (astrologie)]] [[de:Holz-Hahneen]] [[en:Wood Rooster]] [[fr:Coq de boisboishak]] [[it:Yit-chṳ́id]] [[sn:ichouja]] [[vi:Ất Dậu]] [[za:Yitceij]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Wood Rooster}} [[ar:Yin Wood Rooster]]

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} or to the {{ill|Seasonal Month|ja|節月|12=draft|12=draft}} (from {{ill|White Dew|ja|白露|12=draft|12=draft}} until the day before {{ill|Lesser Cold|ja|寒露|12=draft|12=draft}}) as applicable.
==Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s Days== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=draft|12=draft}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|乙酉|12=draft|12=draft}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=draft|12=draft}}.

--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:25|25]] * [[:en:85|85]] * [[:en:145|145]] * [[:en:205|205]] * [[:en:265|265]] * [[:en:325|325]] * [[:en:385|385]] * [[:en:445|445]] * [[:en:505|505]] * [[:en:565|565]] * [[:en:625|625]] * [[:en:685|685]] * [[:en:745|745]] * [[:en:805|805]] * [[:en:865|865]] * [[:en:925|925]] * [[:en:985|985]] | * [[:en:1045|1045]] * [[:en:1105|1105]] * [[:en:1165|1165]] * [[:en:1225|1225]] * [[:en:1285|1285]] * [[:en:1345|1345]] * [[:en:1405|1405]] * [[:en:1465|1465]] * [[:en:1525|1525]] * [[:en:1585|1585]] * [[:en:1645|1645]] * [[:en:1705|1705]] * [[:en:1765|1765]] * [[:en:1825|1825]] * [[:en:1885|1885]] * [[:en:1945|1945]] | * [[:en:2005|2005]] * [[:en:2065|2065]] * [[:en:2125|2125]] * [[:en:2185|2185]] * [[:en:2245|2245]] * [[:en:2305|2305]] * [[:en:2365|2365]] * [[:en:2425|2425]] * [[:en:2485|2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[:en:2905|2905]] * [[:en:2965|2965]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q185265]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q185265]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: ikki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul-yu (을유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu

--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: ikki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul-yu (을유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのととり (kinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: おつかのとり (otsuka-no-tori) ***Onyomi: おつゆう (otsuyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:25|25]] * [[:en:85|85]] * [[:en:145|145]] * [[:en:205|205]] * [[:en:265|265]] * [[:en:325|325]] * [[:en:385|385]] * [[:en:445|445]] * [[:en:505|505]] * [[:en:565|565]] * [[:en:625|625]] * [[:en:685|685]] * [[:en:745|745]] * [[:en:805|805]] * [[:en:865|865]] * [[:en:925|925]] * [[:en:985|985]] | * [[:en:1045|1045]] * [[:en:1105|1105]] * [[:en:1165|1165]] * [[:en:1225|1225]] * [[:en:1285|1285]] * [[:en:1345|1345]] * [[:en:1405|1405]] * [[:en:1465|1465]] * [[:en:1525|1525]] * [[:en:1585|1585]] * [[:en:1645|1645]] * [[:en:1705|1705]] * [[:en:1765|1765]] * [[:en:1825|1825]] * [[:en:1885|1885]] * [[:en:1945|1945]] | * [[:en:2005|2005]] * [[:en:2065|2065]] * [[:en:2125|2125]] * [[:en:2185|2185]] * [[:en:2245|2245]] * [[:en:2305|2305]] * [[:en:2365|2365]] * [[:en:2425|2425]] * [[:en:2485|2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[:en:2905|2905]] * [[:en:2965|2965]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:25|25]] * [[:en:85|85]] * [[:en:145|145]] * [[:en:205|205]] * [[:en:265|265]] * [[:en:325|325]] * [[:en:385|385]] * [[:en:445|445]] * [[:en:505|505]] * [[:en:565|565]] * [[:en:625|625]] * [[:en:685|685]] * [[:en:745|745]] * [[:en:805|805]] * [[:en:865|865]] * [[:en:925|925]] * [[:en:985|985]] | * [[:en:1045|1045]] * [[:en:1105|1105]] * [[:en:1165|1165]] * [[:en:1225|1225]] * [[:en:1285|1285]] * [[:en:1345|1345]] * [[:en:1405|1405]] * [[:en:1465|1465]] * [[:en:1525|1525]] * [[:en:1585|1585]] * [[:en:1645|1645]] * [[:en:1705|1705]] * [[:en:1765|1765]] * [[:en:1825|1825]] * [[:en:1885|1885]] * [[:en:1945|1945]] | * [[:en:2005|2005]] * [[:en:2065|2065]] * [[:en:2125|2125]] * [[:en:2185|2185]] * [[:en:2245|2245]] * [[:en:2305|2305]] * [[:en:2365|2365]] * [[:en:2425|2425]] * [[:en:2485|2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[:en:2905|2905]] * [[:en:2965|2965]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houthaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-iū]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[hak:Yet-yû]][[ja:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[nds:Holt-Hahn]][[vi:Ất Dậu]][[za:Ietyoux]][[zh-min-nan:It-iú]][[zh_yue:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q185265]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu
