element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: ikki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul-yu (을유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: ikki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul-yu (을유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのととり (kinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: おつかのとり (otsuka-no-tori) ***Onyomi: おつゆう (otsuyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:25|25]] * [[:en:85|85]] * [[:en:145|145]] * [[:en:205|205]] * [[:en:265|265]] * [[:en:325|325]] * [[:en:385|385]] * [[:en:445|445]] * [[:en:505|505]] * [[:en:565|565]] * [[:en:625|625]] * [[:en:685|685]] * [[:en:745|745]] * [[:en:805|805]] * [[:en:865|865]] * [[:en:925|925]] * [[:en:985|985]] | * [[:en:1045|1045]] * [[:en:1105|1105]] * [[:en:1165|1165]] * [[:en:1225|1225]] * [[:en:1285|1285]] * [[:en:1345|1345]] * [[:en:1405|1405]] * [[:en:1465|1465]] * [[:en:1525|1525]] * [[:en:1585|1585]] * [[:en:1645|1645]] * [[:en:1705|1705]] * [[:en:1765|1765]] * [[:en:1825|1825]] * [[:en:1885|1885]] * [[:en:1945|1945]] | * [[:en:2005|2005]] * [[:en:2065|2065]] * [[:en:2125|2125]] * [[:en:2185|2185]] * [[:en:2245|2245]] * [[:en:2305|2305]] * [[:en:2365|2365]] * [[:en:2425|2425]] * [[:en:2485|2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[:en:2905|2905]] * [[:en:2965|2965]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno '''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: ikki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul-yu (을유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのととり (kinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: おつかのとり (otsuka-no-tori) ***Onyomi: おつゆう (otsuyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:25|25]] * [[:en:85|85]] * [[:en:145|145]] * [[:en:205|205]] * [[:en:265|265]] * [[:en:325|325]] * [[:en:385|385]] * [[:en:445|445]] * [[:en:505|505]] * [[:en:565|565]] * [[:en:625|625]] * [[:en:685|685]] * [[:en:745|745]] * [[:en:805|805]] * [[:en:865|865]] * [[:en:925|925]] * [[:en:985|985]] | * [[:en:1045|1045]] * [[:en:1105|1105]] * [[:en:1165|1165]] * [[:en:1225|1225]] * [[:en:1285|1285]] * [[:en:1345|1345]] * [[:en:1405|1405]] * [[:en:1465|1465]] * [[:en:1525|1525]] * [[:en:1585|1585]] * [[:en:1645|1645]] * [[:en:1705|1705]] * [[:en:1765|1765]] * [[:en:1825|1825]] * [[:en:1885|1885]] * [[:en:1945|1945]] | * [[:en:2005|2005]] * [[:en:2065|2065]] * [[:en:2125|2125]] * [[:en:2185|2185]] * [[:en:2245|2245]] * [[:en:2305|2305]] * [[:en:2365|2365]] * [[:en:2425|2425]] * [[:en:2485|2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[:en:2905|2905]] * [[:en:2965|2965]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:25|25]] * [[:en:85|85]] * [[:en:145|145]] * [[:en:205|205]] * [[:en:265|265]] * [[:en:325|325]] * [[:en:385|385]] * [[:en:445|445]] * [[:en:505|505]] * [[:en:565|565]] * [[:en:625|625]] * [[:en:685|685]] * [[:en:745|745]] * [[:en:805|805]] * [[:en:865|865]] * [[:en:925|925]] * [[:en:985|985]] | * [[:en:1045|1045]] * [[:en:1105|1105]] * [[:en:1165|1165]] * [[:en:1225|1225]] * [[:en:1285|1285]] * [[:en:1345|1345]] * [[:en:1405|1405]] * [[:en:1465|1465]] * [[:en:1525|1525]] * [[:en:1585|1585]] * [[:en:1645|1645]] * [[:en:1705|1705]] * [[:en:1765|1765]] * [[:en:1825|1825]] * [[:en:1885|1885]] * [[:en:1945|1945]] | * [[:en:2005|2005]] * [[:en:2065|2065]] * [[:en:2125|2125]] * [[:en:2185|2185]] * [[:en:2245|2245]] * [[:en:2305|2305]] * [[:en:2365|2365]] * [[:en:2425|2425]] * [[:en:2485|2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[:en:2905|2905]] * [[:en:2965|2965]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: ikki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul-yu (을유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu --> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno ==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: ikki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul-yu (을유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのととり (kinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: おつかのとり (otsuka-no-tori) ***Onyomi: おつゆう (otsuyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:25|25]] * [[:en:85|85]] * [[:en:145|145]] * [[:en:205|205]] * [[:en:265|265]] * [[:en:325|325]] * [[:en:385|385]] * [[:en:445|445]] * [[:en:505|505]] * [[:en:565|565]] * [[:en:625|625]] * [[:en:685|685]] * [[:en:745|745]] * [[:en:805|805]] * [[:en:865|865]] * [[:en:925|925]] * [[:en:985|985]] | * [[:en:1045|1045]] * [[:en:1105|1105]] * [[:en:1165|1165]] * [[:en:1225|1225]] * [[:en:1285|1285]] * [[:en:1345|1345]] * [[:en:1405|1405]] * [[:en:1465|1465]] * [[:en:1525|1525]] * [[:en:1585|1585]] * [[:en:1645|1645]] * [[:en:1705|1705]] * [[:en:1765|1765]] * [[:en:1825|1825]] * [[:en:1885|1885]] * [[:en:1945|1945]] | * [[:en:2005|2005]] * [[:en:2065|2065]] * [[:en:2125|2125]] * [[:en:2185|2185]] * [[:en:2245|2245]] * [[:en:2305|2305]] * [[:en:2365|2365]] * [[:en:2425|2425]] * [[:en:2485|2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[:en:2905|2905]] * [[:en:2965|2965]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

<!-- == * Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのととり (kinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: おつかのとり (otsuka-no-tori) ***Onyomi: おつゆう (otsuyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:25|25]] * [[:en:85|85]] * [[:en:145|145]] * [[:en:205|205]] * [[:en:265|265]] * [[:en:325|325]] * [[:en:385|385]] * [[:en:445|445]] * [[:en:505|505]] * [[:en:565|565]] * [[:en:625|625]] * [[:en:685|685]] * [[:en:745|745]] * [[:en:805|805]] * [[:en:865|865]] * [[:en:925|925]] * [[:en:985|985]] | * [[:en:1045|1045]] * [[:en:1105|1105]] * [[:en:1165|1165]] * [[:en:1225|1225]] * [[:en:1285|1285]] * [[:en:1345|1345]] * [[:en:1405|1405]] * [[:en:1465|1465]] * [[:en:1525|1525]] * [[:en:1585|1585]] * [[:en:1645|1645]] * [[:en:1705|1705]] * [[:en:1765|1765]] * [[:en:1825|1825]] * [[:en:1885|1885]] * [[:en:1945|1945]] | * [[:en:2005|2005]] * [[:en:2065|2065]] * [[:en:2125|2125]] * [[:en:2185|2185]] * [[:en:2245|2245]] * [[:en:2305|2305]] * [[:en:2365|2365]] * [[:en:2425|2425]] * [[:en:2485|2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[:en:2905|2905]] * [[:en:2965|2965]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Houthaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ĭk-iū]][[de:Holz-Hahn]][[fr:Coq de bois]][[hak:Yet-yû]][[ja:乙酉]][[ko:을유]][[nds:Holt-Hahn]][[vi:Ất Dậu]][[za:Ietyoux]][[zh-min-nan:It-iú]][[zh-yue:乙酉]][[zh:乙酉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q185265]] Wikidata name: Yin Wood Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: ikki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul-yu (을유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのととり (kinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: おつかのとり (otsuka-no-tori) ***Onyomi: おつゆう (otsuyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:25|25]] * [[:en:85|85]] * [[:en:145|145]] * [[:en:205|205]] * [[:en:265|265]] * [[:en:325|325]] * [[:en:385|385]] * [[:en:445|445]] * [[:en:505|505]] * [[:en:565|565]] * [[:en:625|625]] * [[:en:685|685]] * [[:en:745|745]] * [[:en:805|805]] * [[:en:865|865]] * [[:en:925|925]] * [[:en:985|985]] | * [[:en:1045|1045]] * [[:en:1105|1105]] * [[:en:1165|1165]] * [[:en:1225|1225]] * [[:en:1285|1285]] * [[:en:1345|1345]] * [[:en:1405|1405]] * [[:en:1465|1465]] * [[:en:1525|1525]] * [[:en:1585|1585]] * [[:en:1645|1645]] * [[:en:1705|1705]] * [[:en:1765|1765]] * [[:en:1825|1825]] * [[:en:1885|1885]] * [[:en:1945|1945]] | * [[:en:2005|2005]] * [[:en:2065|2065]] * [[:en:2125|2125]] * [[:en:2185|2185]] * [[:en:2245|2245]] * [[:en:2305|2305]] * [[:en:2365|2365]] * [[:en:2425|2425]] * [[:en:2485|2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[:en:2905|2905]] * [[:en:2965|2965]] |}

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol [[:en:Rooster (zodiac)|Rooster (酉)]] represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: ikki ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul-yu (을유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): jat1 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: きのととり (kinoto-tori) ***Onyomi: おつかのとり (otsuka-no-tori) ***Onyomi: おつゆう (otsuyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): eulyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:25|25]] * [[:en:85|85]] * [[:en:145|145]] * [[:en:205|205]] * [[:en:265|265]] * [[:en:325|325]] * [[:en:385|385]] * [[:en:445|445]] * [[:en:505|505]] * [[:en:565|565]] * [[:en:625|625]] * [[:en:685|685]] * [[:en:745|745]] * [[:en:805|805]] * [[:en:865|865]] * [[:en:925|925]] * [[:en:985|985]] | * [[:en:1045|1045]] * [[:en:1105|1105]] * [[:en:1165|1165]] * [[:en:1225|1225]] * [[:en:1285|1285]] * [[:en:1345|1345]] * [[:en:1405|1405]] * [[:en:1465|1465]] * [[:en:1525|1525]] * [[:en:1585|1585]] * [[:en:1645|1645]] * [[:en:1705|1705]] * [[:en:1765|1765]] * [[:en:1825|1825]] * [[:en:1885|1885]] * [[:en:1945|1945]] | * [[:en:2005|2005]] * [[:en:2065|2065]] * [[:en:2125|2125]] * [[:en:2185|2185]] * [[:en:2245|2245]] * [[:en:2305|2305]] * [[:en:2365|2365]] * [[:en:2425|2425]] * [[:en:2485|2485]] * [[2545]] * [[2605]] * [[2665]] * [[2725]] * [[2785]] * [[2845]] * [[:en:2905|2905]] * [[:en:2965|2965]] |}
==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.

--> ==Years of Yin Wood Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Wood Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Wood Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows. ==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}=== 乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}}.
